TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_kgi, title = kgi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/kgi} }

S.FORM: kgi ga 'yaya stinun naha, kgi ga pnuhi na Tayal nanak, kutun naha kgi laga, mkgi ro bkuyan naha wayey kya, ro stinun naha lukus Tayal kya. kilgal kbaley lukus nya sbiru suruw: gmegey nuka:kutun naha kgi laga slayun naha abow kgi, hakut naha ro cyan naha bih kyan syasiy kya, s'agal naha ruma ro kgusun naha yula', ro mkgi naha, ro srpux naha kgi ro gmegey naha nuka ro wagan naha bulit ro pgyan naha tanux. p'ubuy wayey ro bkuy wayey: slyun kwara nuka gnegey naha ro inbuyan naha kwara wayey. phagay wayey: s'agal naha phgayan wayey ro phagey wayey, tmwang khtuw ro musa hyuti ci ha'iy wayey. tmahu' wayey: tmagan 'sya ro bulit wayey ro thkun iyik bih tupih, sa'ing tmuting tpuyan ta, inwaxan urow nya ro galun syup nya, ro musa mlabuw wayey. "gaga cinmagan wayey hiya, tgmagan bulit ga musa mlabuw wayey haca, tmagan maci ro thpuyan ga musa mtalah, ro mtalah ha'iy." kkbalay na latan Tayan hiya maga mutuw naha skahun sku kgiy muwah kbalay,utux utux sali ga niya mmuhiy na kgiy, kgiy hani ga aw mutuw pinhyun sku ryax na tmangu abaw, 'bagan, ru mshuw abaw. pinhyun nya sku rhyan hiya ga siki msmi tikay ru blay ms'uraw na rhyan, pyang blay ga siki mtesuruw na syax witux mutuw yenga pinhtgan sa wawi ru kthuy helaw balay mrkyas, ana wayay nuka nya ga mutuw blay pinhtgan nya. sraral kgi ga klayun ta lukus ru pala. Bnrwan qa galan cpung śēôŤā≤ťÉ®-śúóŤĀ≤ŚõõŤĶ∑

kgi ga 'yaya stinun naha, kgi ga pnuhi na Tayal nanak, kutun naha kgi laga, mkgi ro bkuyan naha wayey kya, ro stinun naha lukus Tayal kya. kilgal kbaley lukus nya sbiru suruw: gmegey nuka:kutun naha kgi laga slayun naha abow kgi, hakut naha ro cyan naha bih kyan syasiy kya, s'agal naha ruma ro kgusun naha yula', ro mkgi naha, ro srpux naha kgi ro gmegey naha nuka ro wagan naha bulit ro pgyan naha tanux. p'ubuy wayey ro bkuy wayey: slyun kwara nuka gnegey naha ro inbuyan naha kwara wayey. phagay wayey: s'agal naha phgayan wayey ro phagey wayey, tmwang khtuw ro musa hyuti ci ha'iy wayey. tmahu' wayey: tmagan 'sya ro bulit wayey ro thkun iyik bih tupih, sa'ing tmuting tpuyan ta, inwaxan urow nya ro galun syup nya, ro musa mlabuw wayey. "gaga cinmagan wayey hiya, tgmagan bulit ga musa mlabuw wayey haca, tmagan maci ro thpuyan ga musa mtalah, ro mtalah ha'iy." kkbalay na latan Tayan hiya maga mutuw naha skahun sku kgiy muwah kbalay,utux utux sali ga niya mmuhiy na kgiy, kgiy hani ga aw mutuw pinhyun sku ryax na tmangu abaw, 'bagan, ru mshuw abaw. pinhyun nya sku rhyan hiya ga siki msmi tikay ru blay ms'uraw na rhyan, pyang blay ga siki mtesuruw na syax witux mutuw yenga pinhtgan sa wawi ru kthuy helaw balay mrkyas, ana wayay nuka nya ga mutuw blay pinhtgan nya. sraral kgi ga klayun ta lukus ru pala. Bnrwan qa galan cpung śēôŤā≤ťÉ®-śúóŤĀ≤ŚõõŤĶ∑
S.PHON: k…£i …£a Ējaja s~…ētinun nańßa, k…£i …£a pnuńßi na tajal nanak, kutun nańßa k…£i la…£a, mk…£i ro ő≤kujan nańßa wajej kja, ro s~…ētinun nańßa lukus~…ē tajal kja. kil…£al kő≤alej lukus~…ē nja s~…ēő≤iru s~…ēuruw: …£me…£ej nuka:kutun nańßa k…£i la…£a s~…ēlajun nańßa aő≤ow k…£i, ńßakut nańßa ro ¶~ ®jan nańßa ő≤ińß kjan s~…ējas~…ēij kja, s~…ē Ēa…£al nańßa ruma ro k…£us~…ēun nańßa jula Ē, ro mk…£i nańßa, ro s~…ērpux nańßa k…£i ro …£me…£ej nańßa nuka ro wa…£an nańßa ő≤ulit ro p…£jan nańßa tanux. p Ēuő≤uj wajej ro ő≤kuj wajej: s~…ēljun kwara nuka …£ne…£ej nańßa ro inő≤ujan nańßa kwara wajej. pńßa…£aj wajej: s~…ē Ēa…£al nańßa pńß…£ajan wajej ro pńßa…£ej wajej, tmwaŇč kńßtuw ro mus~…ēa ńßjuti ¶~ ®i ńßa Ēij wajej. tmańßu Ē wajej: tma…£an Ēs~…ēja ro ő≤ulit wajej ro tńßkun ijik ő≤ińß tupińß, s~…ēa ĒiŇč tmutiŇč tpujan ta, inwaxan urow nja ro …£alun s~…ējup nja, ro mus~…ēa mlaő≤uw wajej. "…£a…£a ¶~ ®inma…£an wajej ńßija, t…£ma…£an ő≤ulit …£a mus~…ēa mlaő≤uw wajej ńßa ¶~ ®a, tma…£an ma ¶~ ®i ro tńßpujan …£a mus~…ēa mtalańß, ro mtalańß ńßa Ēij." kkő≤alaj na latan tajan ńßija ma…£a mutuw nańßa s~…ēkańßun s~…ēku k…£ij muwańß kő≤alaj,utux utux s~…ēali …£a nija mmuńßij na k…£ij, k…£ij ńßani …£a aw mutuw pinńßjun s~…ēku rjax na tmaŇču aő≤aw, Ēő≤a…£an, ru ms~…ēńßuw aő≤aw. pinńßjun nja s~…ēku rńßjan ńßija …£a s~…ēiki ms~…ēmi tikaj ru ő≤laj ms~…ē Ēuraw na rńßjan, pjaŇč ő≤laj …£a s~…ēiki mtes~…ēuruw na s~…ējax witux mutuw jeŇča pinńßt…£an s~…ēa wawi ru ktńßuj ńßelaw ő≤alaj mrkjas~…ē, ana wajaj nuka nja …£a mutuw ő≤laj pinńßt…£an nja. s~…ēraral k…£i …£a klajun ta lukus~…ē ru pala. ő≤nrwan qa …£alan ¶~ ®puŇč ***-****
